title: Endless Villages
description: The Endless Villages datapack for Minecraft is designed to completely transform your survival world by filling the landscape with villages everywhere you go.
body:
![Endless Villages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28dc014a1063a1f60e7185674979358ce15635b8.jpeg)

The Endless Villages datapack for Minecraft is designed to completely transform your survival world by filling the landscape with villages everywhere you go. Instead of traveling long distances hoping to stumble upon a village, this datapack ensures that settlements are common, frequent, and practically endless.

🔹 Core Features
- 
- Villages Everywhere: The world generates with villages scattered across almost every area, making them a constant part of exploration.
- Immersive Worldbuilding: Since villages become the main terrain feature, your survival experience feels like living in a vast civilization rather than isolated wilderness.
- Perfect for Roleplay & Adventure: Players who enjoy interacting with structures, looting, or setting up bases inside villages will find this datapack especially useful.

🔹 Gameplay Impact

- Easy Access to Resources: With villages all around, you’ll quickly find beds, farms, loot chests, and villagers for trading.
- Less Wilderness, More Civilization: Exploration becomes centered on villages instead of mountains, forests, or deserts.
- Endless Opportunities: You can chain together adventures across countless settlements, building stories around the sheer number of villages.
- Optimized Performance: To keep the world smooth and lag-free, villagers and animals have been removed — leaving behind only the endless structures of civilization.

🔹 Notes

Works on Minecraft 1.21.x

Lightweight and optimized so you can enjoy the atmosphere of endless villages without the lag.
